name: SINDING-LARSEN-JOHANSSON DISEASE
definition: osteochondrosis of inferior pole of patella, often bilateral (NOT osteonecrosis / epiphysitis /
dominant_finding: thickening of patellar tendon without tear / avulsion
distribution: hypointense area on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI in inferior pole of patella + proximal
